title: KECFEST 2026 — Annual Technical Festival
summary: KEC's flagship 3-day technical fest featuring hackathons, paper presentations, robotics arena, coding contests, and expert talks from industry leaders.

title: UTSAV 2026 — Cultural Extravaganza
summary: Two days of vibrant cultural celebrations featuring classical & western dance, music performances, drama, fine arts, and fashion show with participation from 30+ colleges.

title: Inter-College Cricket Tournament 2026
summary: Annual inter-college cricket championship with 16 teams competing for the KEC Cricket Trophy. Open to all affiliated Anna University colleges.

title: National Workshop on AI & Machine Learning
summary: Two-day hands-on national workshop covering Python for ML, deep learning fundamentals, model deployment on cloud platforms, and real-world case studies.

title: KEC Alumni Grand Meet 2026
summary: Annual alumni reunion bringing together graduates from 20+ batches. Distinguished alumni to share their experiences and mentor current students over a grand dinner.

title: Annual Sports Day 2026
summary: KEC's grand annual sports day featuring track & field events, relay races, volleyball, basketball, and the inter-department championship for 2025-26.

title: SPECTRUM 2026 — National Technical Symposium
summary: National-level technical symposium with paper presentations, project expos, quiz competitions, and workshops conducted by the ECE and CSE departments.

title: Freshers Day 2025-26 — Welcome Ceremony
summary: Grand welcome celebration for the batch of 2025-29 featuring cultural performances, prize distribution, and the official welcome address by the Principal.

title: ICEET 2025 — International Conference on Engineering Technologies
summary: Two-day international conference attracting 200+ researchers from 12 countries. Topics covered emerging engineering technologies, IoT, sustainable energy, and smart systems.

title: Inter-Department Football League 2025
summary: Two-week football league with all 12 departments fielding teams. CSE Department won the trophy for the second consecutive year beating ECE in the final.

title: Workshop on Cybersecurity & Ethical Hacking
summary: One-day intensive workshop on ethical hacking, penetration testing, network security, and CTF challenges conducted by certified cybersecurity professionals.

title: Sangamam 2025 — Classical Music & Dance Festival
summary: Annual classical arts festival showcasing Bharatanatyam, Carnatic music, and folk arts by KEC students and invited performers from across Tamil Nadu.

title: Smart India Hackathon — Campus Round 2025
summary: KEC's campus selection round for Smart India Hackathon 2025. 42 teams competed with innovative solutions across healthcare, agriculture, and smart cities themes.

title: KEC Run For Health — Campus Marathon
summary: Campus-wide 5K and 10K marathon promoting health and fitness among students and staff. Over 800 participants from all departments joined the morning run.
